results.rendered_html:
nikṛta p. p.
1 Humbled, cast down, humiliated.
2 Insulted,
(pb) offended;  U. 6. 14. 
3 Deceived, cheated.
4 Removed.
5 Afflicted, injured.
6 Wicked, dishonest.
7 Base, low, vile.
— taṃ Humiliation.
Comp.
— prajña a. evil-minded.
— mati a. depraved in mind, base.
